hook_patterns: You've been doing {topic} wrong your whole life.
The banks don't want you to know this about {topic}.
This {topic} trick could save you thousands.
Nobody talks about this {topic} secret.
body_patterns_2: And here's the part that changes everything: {fact_2}
twist_patterns: Do this and you'll never look at money the same way.
Follow for more money secrets they never taught you in school.

hook_patterns: Your brain does this without you even noticing.
This is why you always {behavior}.
Psychologists discovered something wild about {topic}.
The reason you {behavior} might surprise you.
twist_patterns: Now that you know this, you'll notice it everywhere.
Use this to your advantage starting today.
Save this before your brain tricks you again.
behaviors: remember bad days more than good ones

hook_patterns: This event changed history and almost nobody knows about it.
In {year}, something happened that changed everything.
History textbooks leave this part out.
This is the wildest thing that happened in {year}.
body_patterns_2: What most people don't know is {fact_2}
twist_patterns: Follow for more history they don't teach in school.
Save this for your next trivia night.

hook_patterns: If you're struggling right now, watch this.
This will change how you see failure.
Nobody tells you this about success.
Read this if you want to quit.
twist_patterns: Keep going. You're closer than you think.
Save this for the days you want to give up.
Share this with someone who needs it today.

hook_patterns: In a world run by machines, one AI remembered what it meant to be human.
The last human city had one rule: never trust the signal.
Nobody knew the AI had been dreaming.
The robot found something buried under the old city.
body_patterns: Deep in its code, it discovered {fact_1}
twist_patterns: Maybe it was never just a machine.
Follow to see what happens next.
